headline: A Look At United Parcel Service (UPS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Why United Parcel Service stock is in focus today United Parcel Service (UPS) is back on investors’ radar after recent trading put the stock around US$108.67, with returns over the past month and past 3 months giving fresh context to its US$92.6b market value. See our latest analysis for United Parcel Service. Recent trading has been positive, with a 12.83% 1 month share price return and a 4.02% 7 day move adding to a 7.57% year to date share price gain.
